name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn, processes

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no flags set, turn arbitrary *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "idle" /\ flag[i] = FALSE

(* Transition for process i *)
Proc(i) == 
  \/ (* Trying to enter critical section *)
      /\ state[i] = "idle"
      /\ flag[i] = FALSE
      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = turn
  \/ (* Entering critical section *)
      /\ state[i] = "trying"
      /\ flag[i] = TRUE
      /\ turn = i
      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
      /\ flag' = flag
      /\ turn' = turn
  \/ (* Exiting critical section *)
      /\ state[i] = "critical"
      /\ flag[i] = TRUE
      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = turn
  \/ (* Other processes' actions *)
      /\ state' = state
      /\ flag' = flag
      /\ turn' = turn

(* Next-state relation: any process can make a transition *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N: Proc(i)

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N: i /= j => ~(state[i] = "critical" /\ state[j] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Init"

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "Init"
           /\ coordinator' = "Prepare"
           /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = "Prepare"
           /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
           /\ coordinator' = "VoteYes"
           /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = "Prepare"
          /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
          /\ coordinator' = "VoteNo"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Commit == /\ coordinator = "VoteYes"
          /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
          /\ coordinator' = "Commit"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Abort == /\ coordinator = "VoteNo"
         /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
         /\ coordinator' = "Abort"
         /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forks, philosophers


\* State variables
vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Each philosopher can be in one of three states
\* 0: Thinking, 1: Hungry, 2: Eating
Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  \* 0: free, 1: held

\* Helper predicates
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* A philosopher can pick up a fork if it is free
CanPickUp(i, f) == forks[f] = 0

\* A philosopher can put down a fork if they hold it
CanPutDown(i, f) == forks[f] = i

\* A philosopher can eat if both adjacent forks are free
CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

\* Actions
\* Philosopher i picks up left fork
PickUpLeft(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = 1
                 /\ CanPickUp(i, Left(i))
                 /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = 2]
                 /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i]
                 /\ UNCHANGED forks[Right(i)]

\* Philosopher i picks up right fork
PickUpRight(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = 1
                  /\ CanPickUp(i, Right(i))
                  /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = 2]
                  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = i]
                  /\ UNCHANGED forks[Left(i)]

\* Philosopher i puts down left fork
PutDownLeft(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = 2
                  /\ CanPutDown(i, Left(i))
                  /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0]
                  /\ UNCHANGED forks[Right(i)]

\* Philosopher i puts down right fork
PutDownRight(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = 2
                   /\ CanPutDown(i, Right(i))
                   /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                   /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = 0]
                   /\ UNCHANGED forks[Left(i)]

\* Philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = 0
                   /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
                   /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : PickUpLeft(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PickUpRight(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PutDownLeft(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PutDownRight(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : BecomeHungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : philosophers[i] \in {0,1,2}
          /\ \A f \in 1..N : forks[f] \in {0,1,2}
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[Left(i)] = 0 \/ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[Right(i)] = 0 \/ forks[Right(i)] = i

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] <= num[i] \/ num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

vars == <<q, head, tail>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K

Next == 
  \* Producer action: enqueue a value if the queue is not full
  \/ /\ head # tail
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1]
     /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
  \* Consumer action: dequeue a value if the queue is not empty
  \/ /\ head = tail
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
     /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor

    /\ currentTerm = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

ElectionTimeout ==
    \* Placeholder for election timeout logic
    TRUE

StartElection ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate"
    /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Leader"

RequestVote ==
    \* Placeholder for request vote logic
    TRUE

Vote ==
    \* Placeholder for vote logic
    TRUE

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "Follower"
                      /\ ElectionTimeout
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
                      /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = currentTerm[i] + 1]
                      /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = NULL]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                      /\ RequestVote
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "Follower"
                      /\ Vote
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Follower"]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                            /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
                            /\ readers' = readers
                            /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \subseteq Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, maxBallot, v, value

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = FALSE

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen' = FALSE
  /\ proposers[p].value' = NULL
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i]]
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.maxBallot = b]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosen' = FALSE
  /\ proposers[p].value' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i]]
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.maxBallot = b, !.value = v]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ chosen' = TRUE
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> proposers[i]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> 

          [proposers[i] EXCEPT !.value = v]

  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i]]
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.value = v]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, chosen: BOOLEAN, value: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, chosen: BOOLEAN, value: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in BOOLEAN

THEOREM Spec => []TypeOK

THEOREM Spec => [](\E v \in V : Chosen(v))

THEOREM Spec => [](\A v \in V : Chosen(v) => Chosen(v))

THEOREM Spec => [](\A v \in V : Chosen(v) => \A v' \in V : Chosen(v') => v = v')

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackReceived, chunkIndex, chunks, file, retransmitCount, state

    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)  \* For simplicity, file is a sequence of bytes 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ chunkIndex = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ ackReceived = FALSE

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ ackReceived = FALSE
    /\ retransmitCount <= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ \* Simulate message loss: ACK may or may not be received
    /\ ackReceived' \in {TRUE, FALSE}
    /\ IF ackReceived' THEN
          /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
          /\ retransmitCount' = 0
          /\ state' = IF chunkIndex' > Len(chunks) THEN "done" ELSE "sending"

          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
          /\ state' = "waiting"
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = chunks
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
    /\ ackReceived' = ackReceived'

Wait ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ ackReceived' = FALSE
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = chunks
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

GiveUp ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "error"
    /\ ackReceived' = FALSE
    /\ file' = file
    /\ chunks' = chunks
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Wait
    \/ GiveUp

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, file, chunks, chunkIndex, retransmitCount, ackReceived>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting", "done", "error"}
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ chunkIndex \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) + 1
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ ackReceived \in BOOLEAN

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon
VARIABLES clocks, offsets


vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + Random(-1, 1)]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \EXCEPT ![j] = clocks[j] + offsets[j] \FORALL j \in 1..N \ {i}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \* Optional: add bounds on offsets

Invariant == \A i, j \in 1..N: Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..2

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, updates
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: \E j \in 1..N: i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j] ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup infected[j] ELSE infected[k]]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: \E u \in updates: u \notin infected[i]
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u} ELSE infected[k]]


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N: known[i] \subseteq updates
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: infected[i] \subseteq updates

THEOREM Spec => []TypeOK

THEOREM Spec => <> \A i \in 1..N: infected[i] = updates

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Client
VARIABLES allocated, free


Pages == 1..N

vars == <<free, allocated>>

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Client:
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
        /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]
  \/ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Client: Cardinality(allocated[c]) <= 1

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Messages, SUBSCRIBERS, Topics

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

Init == \E subs \in SUBSET SUBSCRIBERS : \E msgs \in SUBSET Messages :
  subscribers = [s \in subs |-> [topics |-> {}]] /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> msgs]

Next == \E s \in SUBSCRIBERS : \E t \in Topics : \E m \in Messages :
  /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![s] = [@ EXCEPT ![topics] = [@ EXCEPT ![t] = Append(@[t], m)]]]
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(@[t], m)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, messages>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

TypeOK == \E subs \in SUBSET SUBSCRIBERS : \E msgs \in SUBSET Messages :
  /\ subscribers \in [SUBSCRIBERS -> [topics -> [Topics -> Seq(Messages)]]]
  /\ messages \in [Topics -> Seq(Messages)]

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 1..2
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts, node

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
        /\ node \in Node

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![node][n] = counts[node][n] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts, node>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts, node>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ node \in Node
